# CWE-309 — Use of Password System for Primary Authentication (safe) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-309-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

// Safe: primary authentication uses WebAuthn assertion, not password form.
func EnterpriseLogin(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	assertion := r.FormValue("webauthn_assertion")
	if assertion == "" {
		http.Error(w, "webauthn required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	if r.Header.Get("X-WebAuthn-OK") != "true" {
		http.Error(w, "invalid assertion", http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
